message:
refactor(core): route Notify and oneshot through runtime_compat

Centralizes tokio::sync::Notify and tokio::sync::oneshot imports through
the runtime_compat abstraction layer, reducing the blast radius of the
tokio→asupersync migration. Also fixes a rustfmt violation in workflows.rs.

Files changed:
- runtime_compat.rs: add notify and oneshot modules
- spsc_ring_buffer.rs: use runtime_compat::notify::Notify
- search_bridge.rs: use runtime_compat::notify::Notify
- storage.rs: use runtime_compat::oneshot
- workflows.rs: fix formatting of method chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
